title: Tracebit CI/CD & Workstation Security Canaries (3 months free)
description: Tracebit is the leading canary-based detection platform for cloud, identity, and supply chain environments. Tracebit deploys realistic decoy credentials, resources, and assets across cloud infrastructure, identity and workstations., generating high-fidelity alerts the moment an attacker touches them. Tracebit gives security teams early warning of intrusions that bypass traditional detection, including the supply chain compromises that have hit the industry hard (TeamPCP style attacks).
eligibility: AWS Activate members who meet the offer's current provider, account, and regional requirements.
value: Tracebit CI/CD & Workstation Security Canaries (3 months free)
